subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-'Alí! We have hearkened unto thy call and thy remembrance, and have beheld thy turning and thy devotion unto God, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی سمعنا ندآئک و ذکرک و راینا توجهک و اقبالک الی الله العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consolation and comfort
